description: Unit tests for the Button component, testing its initialization, toggling behavior, disposal, and integration with jQuery mock.

classes.name: Button
classes.description: The Button class being tested, imported from '../../src/button.js'.

methods.name: Button.getInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Button instance associated with a DOM element.

methods.name: Button.getOrCreateInstance
methods.description: Retrieves the existing Button instance or creates a new one if none exists.

methods.name: Button.jQueryInterface
methods.description: jQuery interface method for Button, enabling jQuery-style invocation.

methods.name: Button.prototype.toggle
methods.description: Method to toggle the button's active state and aria-pressed attribute.

methods.name: Button.prototype.dispose
methods.description: Method to dispose of the Button instance and clean up.
